fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the sales cycle.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the sales cycle.

fields.name: Probability Calculation
fields.tooltip: Specifies the method to use to calculate the probability of opportunities completing the sales cycle. There are four options:

fields.name: Blocked
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the related record is blocked from being posted in transactions, for example a customer that is declared insolvent or an item that is placed in quarantine.

fields.name: No. of Opportunities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of opportunities that you have created using the sales cycle. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Estimated Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the estimated value of all the open opportunities that you have assigned to the sales cycle. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Calcd. Current Value (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the calculated current value of all the open opportunities that you have assigned to the sales cycle. This field is not editable.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that you have assigned comments to the sales cycle.
